name: di-promptu-biblioteka
description: DI Promptų Biblioteka – statinė HTML platforma

scripts.test: node tests/structure.test.js && npm run lint:html && npm run lint:js
scripts.lint:html: npx html-validator-cli --file index.html && npx html-validator-cli --file lt/index.html && npx html-validator-cli --file lt/privatumas.html && npx html-validator-cli --file en/index.html && npx html-validator-cli --file en/privacy.html
